pageTypes.name: blog-post
pageTypes.editableElements:
.post__title:field(title:Titel, name:title, type:string, default:'Skriv en titel', order:1, section:Innehåll, sectionOrder:1),
.post__image:field(title:Bild, name:image, type:image, default:{src:https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1612349317150-e413f6a5b16d?ixid=M3w5ODc2NzB8MHwxfHNlYXJjaHw2fHxjbGluaWN8ZW58MXx8fHwxNzgyOTAxMjU2fDA&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&w=1600&q=80&auto=format&fit=crop,alt:asdf}, order:2, section:Innehåll),
.post__category:field(title:Kategori, name:category, type:string, default:'Hälsa', order:3, col:6, section:Meta, sectionOrder:2, options(vocab:blog-categories)),
.post__author:field(title:Författare, name:author, type:string, default:'Dr. Anna Lindgren', order:4, col:6, section:Meta, options(vocab:blog-authors)),
.post__date:field(title:Publicerad, name:publishedAt, type:string, format:date, default:now, order:5, col:6, section:Meta),
.post__readtime:field(title:Lästid, name:readTime, type:string, default:'5 min lästid', order:6, col:6, section:Meta),
.post__lead:field(title:Ingress, name:lead, type:text, default:'Skriv en kort ingress som beskriver artikeln.', order:7, section:Innehåll, options(layout:editor)),
.post__body:field(title:Text, name:body, type:array, order:8, section:Innehåll, options(layout:blocks)),
:field(title:Taggar, name:tags, type:array, default:['hälsa'], order:9, col:6, section:Meta, options(vocab:blog-tags))

pages.name: index.html
pages.editableElements:
body,
section:attr(class, style),
:is(h1, p, a, img, span):attr(class, style),
:is(svg):attr(style)

pages.name: page-blank.html
pages.editableElements:
main:htmlBlocks(styling:[
  { selector: 'section, div, h1, h2, h3, p, button, a, span, time',
    collection: 'classes',
    categories: 'layout flexbox grid spacing typography colors-backgrounds borders effects Transforms transitions-animation  lists tables miscellaneous' },
    { selector: 'img',                 collection: 'classes', categories: 'radius effects' },
    { selector: 'root',                 collection: 'classes', categories: 'background-color' }
]),
